title: nepeta supina subsp. buschii
intro: Nepeta supina subsp. buschii, also known as Chinese catmint, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to China and Korea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and anxiety, and improving digestion. Nepeta supina subsp. buschii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
